subject: Collection.insert()
truth: Stop using insert(); use insert_one() or insert_many() instead.
quote: Collection.insert() is removed; use insert_one() or insert_many().

subject: Collection.save()
truth: Stop using save(); use insert_one() for new documents or update_one() for existing documents.
quote: Collection.save() is removed; use insert_one() for new documents or update_one() for existing.

subject: Collection.update()
truth: Stop using update(); use update_one() or update_many() instead.
quote: Collection.update() is removed; use update_one() or update_many().

subject: Collection.remove()
truth: Stop using remove(); use delete_one() or delete_many() instead.
quote: Collection.remove() is removed; use delete_one() or delete_many().

subject: Collection.find_and_modify()
truth: Stop using find_and_modify(); use find_one_and_update(), find_one_and_replace(), or find_one_and_delete() instead.
quote: Collection.find_and_modify() is removed; use find_one_and_update(), find_one_and_replace(), or find_one_and_delete().

subject: Collection.count() and Cursor.count()
truth: Stop using count(); use count_documents() or estimated_document_count() instead.
quote: Collection.count() and Cursor.count() are removed; use count_documents() or estimated_document_count().

subject: Collection.ensure_index()
truth: Stop using ensure_index(); use create_index() or create_indexes() instead.
quote: Collection.ensure_index() is removed; use create_index() or create_indexes().

subject: Collection.initialize_ordered_bulk_op() and initialize_unordered_bulk_op()
truth: Stop using initialize_ordered_bulk_op() and initialize_unordered_bulk_op(); use bulk_write() instead.
quote: Collection.initialize_ordered_bulk_op() and initialize_unordered_bulk_op() are removed; use bulk_write().

subject: Collection.group()
truth: Stop using group(); use aggregate() with $group instead.
quote: Collection.group() is removed; use aggregate() with $group.

subject: Collection.map_reduce() and inline_map_reduce()
truth: Stop using map_reduce() and inline_map_reduce(); use aggregate() or db.command('mapReduce', ...) instead.
quote: Collection.map_reduce() and inline_map_reduce() are removed; use aggregate() or db.command('mapReduce', ...).

subject: Collection.reindex()
truth: Stop using reindex(); use db.command('reIndex', 'collection_name') instead.
quote: Collection.reindex() is removed; use db.command('reIndex', 'collection_name').

subject: Collection.parallel_scan()
truth: Stop using parallel_scan(); it has been removed with no replacement.
quote: Collection.parallel_scan() is removed with no replacement.

subject: Database.collection_names()
truth: Stop using collection_names(); use list_collection_names() instead.
quote: Database.collection_names() is removed; use list_collection_names().

subject: Database.authenticate() and Database.logout()
truth: Stop using authenticate() and logout(); create separate MongoClient instances with credentials instead.
quote: Database.authenticate() and Database.logout() are removed; create separate MongoClient instances with credentials.

subject: Database.eval(), Database.system_js, Database.error(), Database.last_status(), Database.previous_error()
truth: Stop using eval(), system_js, error(), last_status(), and previous_error(); they are removed.
quote: Database.eval(), Database.system_js, Database.error(), Database.last_status(), and Database.previous_error() are removed.

subject: Database.current_op()
truth: Stop using current_op(); use database.aggregate([{'$currentOp': {}}]) instead.
quote: Database.current_op() is removed; use database.aggregate([{'$currentOp': {}}]).

subject: Database.add_user() and remove_user()
truth: Stop using add_user() and remove_user(); use db.command('createUser', ...) and db.command('dropUser', ...) instead.
quote: Database.add_user() and remove_user() are removed; use db.command("createUser", ...) and db.command("dropUser", ...).

subject: MongoReplicaSetClient
truth: Stop using MongoReplicaSetClient; use MongoClient instead.
quote: MongoReplicaSetClient is removed; use MongoClient.

subject: MongoClient.database_names()
truth: Stop using database_names(); use list_database_names() instead.
quote: MongoClient.database_names() is removed; use list_database_names().

subject: MongoClient.fsync() and unlock()
truth: Stop using fsync() and unlock(); use client.admin.command('fsync', lock=True) and ('fsyncUnlock') instead.
quote: MongoClient.fsync() and unlock() are removed; use client.admin.command('fsync', lock=True) and ('fsyncUnlock').

subject: IsMaster / NotMasterError
truth: Stop using IsMaster (use Hello) and NotMasterError (use NotPrimaryError).
quote: IsMaster is renamed to Hello; NotMasterError is renamed to NotPrimaryError.

subject: ssl_ca_certs parameter
truth: Stop using ssl_ca_certs; use tlsCAFile instead.
quote: ssl_ca_certs is renamed to tlsCAFile

subject: ssl_certfile + ssl_keyfile parameters
truth: Stop using separate ssl_certfile and ssl_keyfile; use tlsCertificateKeyFile instead.
quote: ssl_certfile+ssl_keyfile are combined into tlsCertificateKeyFile.

subject: ssl_pem_passphrase parameter
truth: Stop using ssl_pem_passphrase; use tlsCertificateKeyFilePassword instead.
quote: ssl_pem_passphrase is renamed to tlsCertificateKeyFilePassword

subject: ssl_crlfile parameter
truth: Stop using ssl_crlfile; use tlsCRLFile instead.
quote: ssl_crlfile to tlsCRLFile.

subject: write-concern option j
truth: Stop using j write-concern option; use journal instead.
quote: The write-concern option j is renamed to journal

subject: write-concern option wtimeout
truth: Stop using wtimeout write-concern option; use wTimeoutMS instead.
quote: wtimeout is renamed to wTimeoutMS.

subject: directConnection default
truth: directConnection now defaults to False instead of None, which may change connection behavior for existing code.
quote: directConnection now defaults to False instead of None.

subject: uuid_representation default
truth: The default uuid_representation changed from PYTHON_LEGACY to UNSPECIFIED, which may break code that reads/writes UUIDs.
quote: The default uuid_representation changed from PYTHON_LEGACY to UNSPECIFIED.

subject: Collection.find() with empty projection {}
truth: Collection.find() with an empty projection {} now returns the entire document instead of just _id.
quote: Collection.find() with an empty projection {} now returns the entire document instead of just _id.

subject: modifiers parameter in find()/find_one()
truth: Stop using the modifiers parameter in find()/find_one(); pass options directly instead.
quote: The modifiers parameter is removed from find()/find_one(); pass options directly.

subject: bson.binary.UUIDLegacy
truth: Stop using bson.binary.UUIDLegacy; use Binary.from_uuid() instead.
quote: bson.binary.UUIDLegacy is removed; use Binary.from_uuid().
